form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 457m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (25.75) behind Mr. Lasso in a Grade 5 on April 11. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Won his last three in a row including a strong win last start racing on the pace over 390m at this track by 3.5 lengths in a Grade 5. In sparkling form and can win again.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 457m at this track behind Mr. Lasso, beaten 11 lengths (26.19). Will not find this easy. Not keen.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth on April 8 over 407m at Rockhampton behind Canya Aurora, beaten 8 lengths (24.28) in a Grade 4/5. Others preferred on this occasion.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at Grafton when a 6 length third but did clock a solid 25.39 over the 450m trip. This tougher but prefer for a place this time.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by 1.5 lengths at this track (25.55) beating Special Rocky in a Grade 5 on April 7. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 484m at Casino clocking 27.97. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.
